executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

board_of_directors.name: James Murdoch
board_of_directors.background: James Murdoch has been a member of the Board since July 2017. He is the founder and CEO of Lupa Systems, an investment holding company, and former CEO of 21st Century Fox.

board_of_directors.name: John Thornton
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

board_of_directors.name: Martin Gilbert
board_of_directors.background: Martin Gilbert was the co-founder and CEO of Aberdeen Asset Management. He is currently Chairman of Revolut and AssetCo plc.
